column2: 1-min resolution; plume establishes <2 min then holds at the
800 ppm (~31.6 %LEL) plateau. Convert applied IN CODE: %LEL = ppm / 500 (fixed). Used by

column1: # external_distance_sweep() to show that up close the cloud is dense enough to alarm even a single
